name: CRUD/vread
description: Conformance tests for version-specific read (GET /{type}/{id}/_history/{vid}) semantics: a valid id+version returns the exact historical version with matching metadata; a never-existing id+version returns 404; an existing id with a never-existing version returns 404. Fixture tagged identifier VREAD-BASIC-1 (fhir262) to avoid colliding with other suites on a shared test server.

variable.name: obsId
variable.description: The server-assigned id from the create response

variable.name: obsVersionId
variable.description: The server-assigned version id from the create response

variable.name: obsLastUpdated
variable.description: The server-assigned lastUpdated timestamp from the create response

operation.description: Create an Observation to obtain a server-assigned id/version for the vread tests

test.name: vread returns the exact historical version requested
test.description: GET /Observation/{id}/_history/{vid} must return HTTP 200 with the same id, meta.versionId, and meta.lastUpdated as the create response, and an ETag header reflecting that version.

operation.description: vread the Observation at its created version

assert.description: Response body must be an Observation
Returned id must match the one assigned at create
Returned meta.versionId must match the requested version
Returned meta.lastUpdated must match the one assigned at create
ETag header must reflect the requested version

test.name: vread of a never-existing id and version returns 404
test.description: GET /Observation/{id}/_history/{vid} for an id that was never assigned by the server must return 404 Not Found.

operation.description: vread an id that was never created

test.name: vread of an existing id with a never-existing version returns 404
test.description: GET /Observation/{id}/_history/{vid} for an id that exists but a version number that was never assigned must return 404 Not Found — the id being valid must not cause the server to fall back to the current version.

operation.description: vread the existing Observation at a version that was never created
Teardown: delete the Observation created for the vread tests
